title: DoorDash Analyst Ratings and Forecast
text: The 32 analysts that cover DoorDash stock have a consensus rating of Buy and an average price target of $257.75, which forecasts a 63.88% increase in the stock price over the next year. DoorDash is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 31.2% and 16.6% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 29.6% per annum. DASH's earnings at 31.2% per year are forecast to grow faster than the US market at 16% per year. Next quarter's earnings estimate for DASH is $0.47 with a range of $0.26 to $0.78, and next quarter's sales forecast is $4.33B with a range of $4.10B to $4.46B. Recent research on DoorDash shows a mix of optimism about long term growth drivers and caution around valuation, investment intensity, and the impact of sector-wide multiple compression. The stock has received strong analyst support despite some mixed market sentiment regarding valuation concerns in the current environment.
